hero.headline:
Your Backyard Retreat Starts
Right Here
hero.subheadline: Your family deserves a backyard that feels like a private resort. Outdoor Innovations brings architects, builders, and artisans together under one roof to design and build custom pools, outdoor kitchens, and living spaces built for Minnesota and Western Wisconsin winters.

services.label: What We Build
services.headline: Design-Build Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> That Endures Every Season
services.subtitle: From custom pools to outdoor kitchens, we handle every detail of your project from concept sketches to the final walkthrough. Built by Midwestern craftsmen who understand freeze-thaw cycles, snow loads, and how to make a backyard shine year-round.

cards.title: Custom In-Ground Pools
cards.description: Resort-style swimming pools designed specifically for Minnesota and Wisconsin climates. We handle engineering, permitting, and construction so you just pick a dive-in date.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Bars
cards.description: Fully equipped cooking and entertaining spaces with built-in grills, countertops, and seating. Designed for four-season Midwestern enjoyment.

cards.title: Pool Houses & Cabanas
cards.description: Custom pool house structures for changing, storage, and entertaining. Architecturally matched to your home for a seamless look.

cards.title: Decks, Patios & Hardscaping
cards.description: Premium pavers, natural stone, and composite decking installed by ICPI-certified crews. Engineered for heavy freeze-thaw cycles.

cards.title: Fire & Water Features
cards.description: Custom fire pits, fireplaces, fountains, and waterfalls that create stunning focal points and extend your outdoor season into fall.

cards.title: Pergolas & Outdoor Rooms
cards.description: Architectural shade structures and fully furnished outdoor living rooms designed for connection, comfort, and year-round gatherings.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us how your family uses your backyard today and how you want to use it tomorrow. We'll visit your property, listen carefully, and provide an honest design consultation at no cost.

steps.title: We Design & Build It
steps.description: Our in-house architects and master builders create detailed plans, handle all permitting, and construct your project with premium materials built to withstand Midwestern weather.

steps.title: Make Memories
steps.description: Your backyard becomes the place your family gathers, entertains, and relaxes for years to come. We stand behind every project with a craftsmanship guarantee.

about.label: Why Families Trust Us
about.headline: Two Decades of Building Backyards That Bring Families Together
about.description: Founded in 2007 by Craig Palmer and Asher Judd — each with 25+ years in landscape architecture — Outdoor Innovations has grown from a two-person crew to a full design-build firm serving the Twin Cities and Western Wisconsin. In 2024, Casey Hedeen's Nature's Quest Inc. merged with us, adding 21 more years of craftsmanship. Every project is handled under one roof: architects, builders, and artisans who treat your backyard like their own.

features.title: Full Design-Build Team
features.description: Architects, builders, and artisans collaborate under one roof so your vision is executed seamlessly from first sketch to final walkthrough.

features.title: Built for Midwestern Winters
features.description: Every pool, patio, and structure we build is engineered for Minnesota freeze-thaw cycles, heavy snow loads, and four-season durability.

features.title: Your Project, Your Timeline
features.description: We tailor every design to your family's lifestyle and budget. No cookie-cutter plans, no high-pressure sales — just honest craftsmanship.

pricing.headline: Transparent Project Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project starts with a free consultation. We provide detailed proposals so you know exactly what you're investing in before we break ground.

guarantee.headline: Our Craftsmanship Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any element of your project doesn't meet the standard we promised, we come back and make it right at no additional cost. We've built our reputation on standing behind every stone, every beam, and every finish — and we're not about to stop after 19 years.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool project take?
faqs.answer: Most custom pool projects take 8-12 weeks from design approval to completion, depending on complexity and permitting. We provide a detailed timeline during your design consultation so you know exactly what to expect.

faqs.question: Do you work through the winter months?
faqs.answer: We plan projects strategically around Minnesota seasons. Design and planning happen in winter so we can break ground early in spring and have your backyard ready for summer. Hardscaping and structural work can continue into late fall.

faqs.question: Can you handle the entire backyard — pool, patio, kitchen, everything?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. That's our specialty. Our design-build model means one team handles architecture, construction, landscaping, and finishing. No juggling subcontractors or worrying about coordination.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the Minneapolis-St. Paul metro, including Stillwater, Woodbury, Lake Elmo, Orono, Minnetonka, Eagan, and Mendota Heights. In Wisconsin, we cover Hudson, New Richmond, and surrounding communities.

faqs.question: What does a typical backyard transformation cost?
faqs.answer: Projects range widely based on scope — from patio installations starting around $15,000 to full backyard transformations with pools, kitchens, and structures. We provide transparent, detailed proposals after your free consultation so there are never surprises.

testimonials.name: Catherine J.
testimonials.text: Asher Judd with Outdoor Innovations created an exceptional landscape design of the pool placement and subsequent hardscape — a perfectly sized pool deck that is beautiful and meets all our entertaining needs.

testimonials.name: Karen M.
testimonials.text: Craig and his team did an outstanding job creating a backyard oasis for us. From the initial design to completion, the professionalism and expertise were evident every step of the way.

testimonials.name: Catherine R.
testimonials.text: We just finished a backyard pool project with Outdoor Innovations and it turned out absolutely beautiful! The whole process was smooth and the results exceeded our expectations.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform
Your Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Get a free design consultation and see what's possible for your outdoor space. No pressure, no obligation — just honest ideas from a team that's been doing this for 19 years.

footer.description: Design-build outdoor living. Serving the Twin Cities and Western Wisconsin since 2007.
